ozzy-osbourne.name: Ozzy Osbourne
careerHighlights: Co-founder of Black Sabbath (1968)
Solo career launched 1980 with Blizzard of Ozz
Multi-Grammy winner
Reality TV pioneer (The Osbournes, 2002-2005)
Rock and Roll Hall of Fame inductee (twice: Black Sabbath and solo)
ozzy-osbourne.knownFor: Pioneer of heavy metal; the Prince of Darkness

sharon-osbourne.name: Sharon Osbourne
careerHighlights: Became Ozzy's manager in 1979
Founded Ozzfest touring festival (1996-2018)
Original judge on The X Factor UK (2004-2007, 2013, 2016-2017)
Co-host of CBS's The Talk (2010-2021)
Managed Motörhead, The Smashing Pumpkins, Gary Moore, Lita Ford
sharon-osbourne.knownFor: Revived Ozzy's career and built the Osbourne media empire

kelly-osbourne.name: Kelly Osbourne
careerHighlights: Debut album Shut Up (2002) on Epic Records
Pop-punk cover of Madonna's Papa Don't Preach (2002)
Second album Sleeping in the Nothing (2005)
Star of MTV's The Osbournes (2002-2005)
Host/co-host of Fashion Police and The Osbournes Podcast
kelly-osbourne.knownFor: Pop-punk singer turned fashion and TV personality

jack-osbourne.name: Jack Osbourne
careerHighlights: Star of MTV's The Osbournes (2002-2005)
Produced documentary God Bless Ozzy Osbourne (2011)
Host of Jack Osbourne: Adrenaline Junkie
Co-host of Ozzy & Jack's World Detour with his father
Paranormal TV host (Portals to Hell, Night of Terror)

aimee-osbourne.name: Aimee Osbourne
careerHighlights: Records and releases music under the name ARO (her initials)
Debut single Raining Gold (2015)
Debut LP Vacare Adamaré (October 2020)
Declined to appear on The Osbournes reality show
Also works as an actress and composer
aimee-osbourne.knownFor: Synth-pop artist; the private Osbourne who chose music over reality TV

jessica-osbourne.name: Jessica Osbourne
careerHighlights: Eldest daughter of Ozzy Osbourne (with first wife Thelma Riley)
Behind-the-camera entertainment work (makeup, costume supervision)
Reportedly works as a surveyor
Never appeared on The Osbournes reality show
Mother of three children with ex-husband Ben Hobbs
jessica-osbourne.knownFor: Ozzy's first daughter who stayed out of the spotlight

louis-osbourne.name: Louis Osbourne
careerHighlights: Professional DJ since the 1990s
Ibiza residencies at Café Mambo and Amnesia (1998-1999)
Runs his own record label, All Sorts
Toured notable venues including House of God (Birmingham) and Afterburner (Germany)
Occasional cameo on season 1 of The Osbournes
louis-osbourne.knownFor: Electronic/dance DJ carving his own path outside Ozzy's shadow

elliot-kingsley.name: Elliot Kingsley
careerHighlights: Ozzy's adopted son (son of Thelma Riley from a prior relationship)
Stage actor working in theatre
Lives in Wellington, New Zealand
Kept an entirely private life away from the Osbourne media spotlight
Previously lived in Scotland with wife Joanne Crawford
elliot-kingsley.knownFor: Private theatre actor; the least publicly known Osbourne child

sid-wilson.name: Sid Wilson
careerHighlights: Turntablist #0 for Slipknot (since 1998)
Contributed to all Slipknot studio albums
Solo jungle/drum-and-bass project as DJ Starscream
Signed to Japanese label N2O Records
Known for his trademark gas-mask stage attire
sid-wilson.knownFor: Slipknot's masked DJ #0; partner of Kelly Osbourne and father to her child
sid-wilson.genre: Heavy Metal / Nu-Metal / Drum and Bass
